questions: What ticket data does the CLI currently display and how would it show approval status?

answers.answer: The CLI's TicketDetail type (get.ts lines 5-22) has status and mergeQueueStatus but no approval field. The TicketItem type (list.ts lines 5-12) has only status. Both commands display raw status strings. Once the server adds approval status to ticket list/detail responses, the CLI needs to: (1) add the field to its types, and (2) display it alongside status in both get and list output.
evidence: src/tickets/get.ts lines 5-22: TicketDetail has status, mergeQueueStatus — no approval field
src/tickets/list.ts lines 5-12: TicketItem has status — no approval field
src/tickets/list.ts line 105: prints ticket.status padded to 12 chars

statement: CLI needs to consume the new approvalStatus field from server responses and display it in both hlx tickets get and hlx tickets list. Changes are minimal: update type definitions and add conditional display lines. No new CLI commands needed for this ticket — the scope is status visibility, not approval workflow commands.
